description_long: This is a robust adult pedestrian figure with a broad, muscular build and a slightly hunched posture, suggesting a powerful physique. The head is prominent and slightly forward, with defined shoulders and thick arms that hang naturally at the sides. The figure is dressed in a heavy, loose-fitting jacket over a shirt, with baggy pants that gather at the ankles, and sturdy footwear. The silhouette is compact and dense, with a wide chest and narrow lower legs, giving the impression of strength and stability. The hands are relaxed, and the overall stance indicates movement, as if the person is in mid-stride. The head appears to have short hair or is possibly bald, with no visible accessories or carried objects.
description: A broad, muscular adult pedestrian in a heavy jacket and baggy pants, mid-stride with a powerful build. The figure has a compact silhouette and sturdy footwear.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the wide chest, muscular arms, and forward-facing head, with both legs visible in a walking motion.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the hunched posture, thick arms, and the forward stride of the left leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the broad back, relaxed arms, and the back of the head, with the right leg slightly forward.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the compact build, bent right arm, and the stride of the right leg.
attribute_clothing_type: heavy jacket over a shirt and baggy pants
